ctx.name: Taya
ctx.notes: having issues with the clients requiremetns

introQueue.label: Self-read opener
introQueue.name: Before I share my view, how do you think the last stretch has gone?
introQueue.description: Anchors the conversation in their self-assessment first; gap vs manager's view becomes a signal.

introQueue.label: What they're proud of
introQueue.name: What's something from the last quarter you're genuinely proud of — not what looks good, what actually was good?
introQueue.description: Separates real wins from performative ones; calibrates their sense of impact.

introQueue.label: Gap awareness
introQueue.name: Where do you think you've fallen short of where you want to be?
introQueue.description: Tests whether they can name their own gaps before the manager does.

focus_points.label: Managing client expectations effectively
focus_points.reason: Notes mention issues with client requirements. Could be a misalignment in understanding, communication breakdown, or evolving client needs — worth exploring the root cause.

focus_points.label: Clarity in communicating project scope and changes
focus_points.reason: Issues with client requirements could stem from unclear communication. Worth clarifying whether the challenge is in initial scoping, ongoing updates, or handling changes.

focus_points.label: Delegation to maintain focus on strategic tasks
focus_points.reason: No specific signal — typical director-level focus. Ensuring Taya isn't bogged down by client issues at the expense of strategic priorities might be necessary.

focus_points.label: Impact on client satisfaction and project success
focus_points.reason: No specific signal — standard performance topic. Understanding how these client requirement issues are affecting overall project success and client satisfaction is crucial.

focus_points.label: Judgment in prioritizing and resolving client issues
focus_points.reason: No specific signal — role-driven reflection. Evaluating how Taya navigates prioritizing client issues and making judgment calls could reveal opportunities for growth.

selectedFocusPoints.label: Judgment in prioritizing and resolving client issues
selectedFocusPoints.reason: No specific signal — role-driven reflection. Evaluating how Taya navigates prioritizing client issues and making judgment calls could reveal opportunities for growth.
